summary: Content Studio and Sales Content Hub features fully tested. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified for both Admin Content Studio page and Staff Sales Content Hub page.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminContentStudioPage.jsx: Well-structured with THEMES and FORMATS constants, proper data-testid attributes throughout
AdminContentStudioPage.jsx: BrandedCreative component uses html2canvas for PNG generation with 2x scale for quality
AdminContentStudioPage.jsx: generateCaptions function creates 4 caption types (short, social, whatsapp, story)
SalesContentHubPage.jsx: Mobile-first design with always-visible Download and Copy Caption buttons
SalesContentHubPage.jsx: Filters products/services to only show items with images
SalesContentHubPage.jsx: WhatsApp caption marked as DEFAULT for sales staff convenience
content_template_routes.py: Products endpoint enriches data with pricing tiers and active promotions
content_template_routes.py: Branding endpoint pulls from both business_settings and settings_hub collections
StaffLayout.jsx: Content link correctly navigates to /staff/content-hub
adminNavigation.js: Content Studio correctly placed under GROWTH & AFFILIATES section
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products with LAUNCH2026 promotion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Studio at /admin/content-studio and Sales Content Hub at /staff/content-hub are fully functional. Content Studio uses html2canvas for client-side branded creative rendering. Sales Content Hub pulls from /api/content-engine/template-data/products endpoint. Staff login uses /api/admin/auth/login with sales role.

backend_apis.GET /api/content-engine/template-data/pr: Returns enriched product data with pricing, promotions, images (26 products)
backend_apis.GET /api/content-engine/template-data/br: Returns branding info (company name, logo, colors, contact)
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/auth/login (staff): Staff login with sales role works correctly

admin_content_studio.Page loads: Content Studio page at /admin/content-studio loads with title and subtitle
admin_content_studio.Products/Services tabs: Products (26) and Services (0) tabs work correctly
admin_content_studio.Theme selectors: Light, Dark Premium, Promotional, Clean Minimal - all 4 themes work
admin_content_studio.Product grid: Shows products with images, promo badges (LAUNCH2026), pricing, Save amounts
admin_content_studio.Generate Creative button: Appears on hover over product cards
admin_content_studio.Creative Preview Drawer: Opens when clicking product card, shows branded template preview
admin_content_studio.Theme switching in drawer: Changes creative preview style in real-time
admin_content_studio.Download button: Shows correct dimensions, generates PNG via html2canvas
admin_content_studio.Caption sections: Short Caption, Social Post, WhatsApp/Sales, Story Text - all with Copy buttons
admin_content_studio.Sidebar navigation: Content Studio accessible under GROWTH & AFFILIATES section

staff_sales_content_hub.Staff login: staff@konekt.co.tz / Staff123! redirects to staff dashboard
staff_sales_content_hub.Page loads: Sales Content Hub at /staff/content-hub loads with 'Content to Share' title
staff_sales_content_hub.Tabs: All, Products, Services tabs filter content correctly
staff_sales_content_hub.Content cards: Show product images, promo badges, pricing, Save amounts
staff_sales_content_hub.Download button: Always visible on each card, downloads product image
staff_sales_content_hub.Copy Caption button: Always visible on each card, copies WhatsApp caption by default
staff_sales_content_hub.Sales Preview Drawer: Shows large image, Download Image button, price info
staff_sales_content_hub.Caption sections in drawer: WhatsApp/Sales (DEFAULT), Short Caption, Social Post - all with Copy buttons
staff_sales_content_hub.Sidebar navigation: Content link visible in staff sidebar, navigates to /staff/content-hub
